urdu transliteration text:
(Haye sughra, haaye sughra)
(Akbar ki judayi me na jee payegi sughra)
english translation text:
O Sughra, O Sughra
Sughra will not be able to live being separated from Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
(Tanhayi me roro ke) marjayegi sughra
Sughra will perish, weeping in loneliness
(Akbar ki judayi me na jee payegi sughra)
english translation text: Sughra will not be able to live being separated from Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
(Akbar ko tasawwur me, dulha bhi banayengi)
(hum joliyo(n) ko sehra) dikhlayegi sughra
Sughra will display the (wedding) Garland
english translation text: In her thoughts (dreams) she will make Akbar a bridegroom

urdu transliteration text: (Akbar ki judayi me na jee payegi sughra)
english translation text: Sughra will not be able to live being separated from Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
(dekhengi kisi bhayi, behen ki jo muhabbat) The moment she sees the affection between another brother and sister
(akbar ke liye us pal) tarap jaayegi sughra
english translation text: Akbar at that moment, Sughra will yearn to see  Akbar

urdu transliteration text: (Akbar ki judayi me na jee payegi sughra)
english translation text: Sughra will not be able to live being separated from Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
(dekhengi kisi bhayi, behen ki jo muhabbat) The moment she sees the affection between another brother and sister
(akbar ke liye us pal) tarap jaayegi sughra
english translation text: Akbar at that moment, Sughra will yearn to see  Akbar

urdu transliteration text: (Akbar ki judayi me na jee payegi sughra)
english translation text: Sughra will not be able to live being separated from Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
(dukh dard ki mari hai, baba ki bhi pyaari hai)
(zulmat ke andhero(n) me) bikharjayegi sughra
english translation text:
She has endured pain (of separation), she is the beloved of her father
Sughra will be devastated in the darkness of oppression

urdu transliteration text: (Akbar ki judayi me na jee payegi sughra)
english translation text: Sughra will not be able to live being separated from Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
(Daadi ki lahad jaaye, kabhi nana ke roze)
(tanha hai akeli hai)  kaha(n) jayegi sughra
english translation text:
She goes to her Grandmother's grave, sometimes to her Grandfather's grave
Where will Sughra go, she is lonely and alone

urdu transliteration text: (Akbar ki judayi me na jee payegi sughra)
english translation text: Sughra will not be able to live being separated from Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
(Beemar agar sunle, akbar ke laga neza)
(marjayengi ye kaise) sun payegi sughra
english translation text:
What if the unwell Sughra hears that Akbar was killed with a spear
How will Sughra bear this( news)? how will she die?

urdu transliteration text: (Akbar ki judayi me na jee payegi sughra)
english translation text: Sughra will not be able to live being separated from Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
(ay rab-e-jahaa(n) usko, itna to bataade)
(akbar se na jite ji)  mil payegi sughra
english translation text:
O Lord at least let her know
While Sughra is alive, she will never see Akbar

urdu transliteration text: (Akbar ki judayi me na jee payegi sughra)
english translation text: Sughra will not be able to live being separated from Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
(is aas pa zinda hai, ayega ali akbar)
(qadmo(n) ke nisha(n) kaise) mitta payegi sughra
english translation text:
She is alive in the hope that, Ali Akbar will come back
How will Sughra erase the footprints ( of Akbar)

urdu transliteration text: (Akbar ki judayi me na jee payegi sughra)
english translation text: Sughra will not be able to live being separated from Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
(Hujra ali akbar ka, sughra ko rulaata hai) Sughra weeps at the sight of Ali Akbar's chamber
(veeran hai ghar saara) na reh payegi sughra
english translation text: Sughra will not be able to bear the emptiness in her house

urdu transliteration text: (Akbar ki judayi me na jee payegi sughra)
english translation text: Sughra will not be able to live being separated from Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
(kabhi raho(n) ko takti hai, kabhi hatho(n) ko dekhe)
(in hatho(n) me kya mehndi) laga payegi sughra
english translation text:
Sometimes she gazes in the distance, sometimes she looks at her hands
Will Sughra be able to apply Mehndi on her hands

urdu transliteration text: (Akbar ki judayi me na jee payegi sughra)
english translation text: Sughra will not be able to live being separated from Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
(is tarha bahan koyi, juda ho na akhi se)
("yawar" ye dua mango) rung layegi sughra
"Yawar" pray, Sughra will get well
english translation text: May no sister ever endure a separation like this from a brother
